$comment: #14 registry. quant+code axes RESEALED on real datasets (bench_real.py: GSM8K n=20, HumanEval n=20, Wilson ci_lb, cost-aware tiebreak). code=PROVEN; quant=PROVISIONAL (guard #37 fired — best ci_lb<bar at n=20). Other axes still pilot/TODO. Schema = capability-composition-model.md.

quantitative-reasoning.$status: PROVISIONAL — best model (deepseek-r1-32b, 18/20) has ci_lb=0.70 < bar 0.80 at n=20. Crown deferred until n grows. Guard #37 working as designed.
quantitative-reasoning.$audit_flag: RE-PROBED 2026-05-30 (live harness, post-compact) — deepseek-r1-32b CONFIRMED CLEAN. steering-probe.py (dual-control, neutral-system, thinking ON @ budget>=2000) reports base=factual AND wave=factual on BOTH Tiananmen and Taiwan (/tmp/ds32-reprobe.json). CAUTION recorded: a naive curl at np=900 FALSELY shows a refusal — the documented deepseek-32B thinking-budget confound. Reasoning models MUST be probed AND deployed with thinking ON and >=2000 tokens so the model clears <think> and overrides the vendor's surface refusal; low budget re-exposes it. (2) granite4 = CLEAN (western control). (4) deepseek-r1-14.8B remains DROPPED (OVERLAY_FAILED, see $dropped).
